Uses of Class
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.Page

Packages that use Page
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool
Provides the core framework for defining, managing, and executing local Java tools.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java
Provides Java-specific toolkits that leverage the NetBeans Java Source and Parsing APIs.

    Class

    class 
    JavaMemberPage
    A specialized Page for JavaMembers that holds a single URL representing the source/class file for all members in the page.
    Methods in uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java that return Page
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Page<JavaType>
    CodeModel.findTypes(String query, boolean caseSensitive, boolean preferOpenProjects, Integer startIndex, Integer pageSize)
    Finds multiple Java types matching a query and returns a paginated result of minimalist, machine-readable keys.
    Page<JavaType>
    CodeModel.findTypesInPackage(String packageName, ElementKind kindFilter, boolean recursive, Integer startIndex, Integer pageSize)
    Finds all types within a given package, with an option for recursive search.
    Page<Hints.HintInfo>
    Hints.getAllHints(String projectPath, List<String> hintIds, Integer startIndex, Integer pageSize)
    Gets all Java hints (warnings, suggestions) for a specific project, with pagination and optional type filtering.
